api_coverage.detection_note: Contract URLs found but no operations parsed

top_findings: API usage-doc coverage is low: 36.92% (239 API pages detected)

analysis.executive_summary: Audit of Tailscale documentation (https://tailscale.com/docs) crawled 1,091 pages with 100% coverage across 1,092 discovered pages. Critical issue: 152 confirmed broken internal documentation links require immediate remediation. API reference coverage is low at 36.92% across 239 detected API pages. Example code reliability estimated at 84.46% and last-updated metadata present on 84.33% of pages. Overall audit confidence is 91.5%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% (1,091 of 1,092 pages successfully crawled)
High overall audit confidence at 91.5% with strong link verification confidence at 95%
Example code reliability estimated at 84.46%, indicating majority of code samples are functional
Last-updated metadata present on 84.33% of documentation pages, supporting freshness tracking
Zero repository navigation broken links (repo_broken_links_count: 0), all broken links are user-facing documentation
risks: 152 confirmed broken internal documentation links directly impact user navigation and trust
Low API reference coverage at 36.92% leaves 63% of API surface undocumented or poorly linked
SEO/geo issue rate at 9.42% may affect discoverability and international user access
15.54% of pages lack last-updated metadata, reducing user confidence in content freshness
15.54% of example code may be unreliable or non-functional, risking developer onboarding friction
239 API pages detected but only 36.92% coverage suggests significant documentation debt
API confidence at 85% indicates potential gaps in automated API detection accuracy

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 152 broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Audit and expand API reference documentation to achieve minimum 70% coverage across 239 detected API pages
Implement automated link checking in CI/CD pipeline to prevent future broken links
Add last-updated metadata to remaining 15.67% of pages and establish update governance
Review and fix unreliable code examples (15.54% failure rate) with automated testing

limitations: External audit cannot verify actual functionality of code examples, only structural reliability estimates
API coverage detection at 85% confidence may miss undocumented endpoints or misclassify page types
Crawl cannot assess content accuracy, technical correctness, or alignment with current product features
SEO/geo issue detection does not guarantee search ranking performance or international accessibility outcomes
Freshness metadata presence does not validate whether content is actually current or requires updates
